title: desmodium canescens var. paleaceum
intro: Desmodium canescens var. paleaceum, also known as pale smooth bean or pale smooth tick clover, is a perennial legume native to North America, characterized by its pale-colored flowers and hairy stems. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Desmodium canescens var. paleaceum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe skin irritations, making it a valuable herbal remedy for promoting overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, wounds, and other minor ailments.
